overall.description: First-person perspective footage from a survival video game showing a character walking along a narrow dirt path through tall grass in a dark forest at night. The character holds a wooden torch that illuminates the immediate surroundings with warm orange light before being extinguished halfway through the clip, plunging the scene into darkness.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest trail illuminated by torchlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt path through tall grass, holding a burning torch in the left hand to light the way through the dark forest

entered.detail: wooden torch held in left hand with bright flame providing warm orange illumination
narrow winding dirt trail cutting through the tall grass
dense tall green grass lining the left side of the path
dense tall green grass lining the right side of the path
dark silhouettes of trees barely visible in the distance beyond the torchlight

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow dirt trail through dense tall grass in a dark forest at night, illuminated by the warm orange glow of a burning torch held in the left hand. The path winds forward with trees visible as dark shapes in the distance beyond the reach of the light.

events.description: torch flame extinguishes, plunging the scene from torch-lit visibility into near-total darkness

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward along the path after the torch has gone out, navigating through the darkness with only minimal ambient light

changed.from: lit with bright flame providing illumination

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the forest trail in near-total darkness after the torch has been extinguished. The dirt path remains barely visible as a darker ribbon through the tall grass, with the unlit torch still held in the left hand.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dark forest that shifts from a warm, torch-lit trek to a state of near-total blindness. It begins with the camera advancing along a narrow dirt trail, where the orange glow of a handheld torch illuminates the surrounding tall grass and reveals the silhouettes of distant trees. As the character continues forward, the torch is suddenly extinguished, causing the warm light to vanish instantly. The scene then plunges into deep shadow, leaving the dirt path as a barely visible ribbon cutting through the grass. Finally, the camera persists through the oppressive darkness, with only the unlit torch remaining visible in the character's grip.
